mapper.select: SELECT ADM_SEQ, ADM_ID, ADM_NM, ADM_ROLE, REG_DT, LAST_LOGIN_DT FROM TB_ADMIN ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
SELECT IP_SEQ, ADM_SEQ, ALLOW_IP, DESCRIPTION, REG_DT FROM TB_ADMIN_IP WHERE ADM_SEQ = #{admSeq} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ADMIN_IP (ADM_SEQ, ALLOW_IP, DESCRIPTION, REG_DT) VALUES (#{admSeq}, #{allowIp}, #{description}, NOW())
